title: Heatwave alert in 16 UP districts, dust-storm, rain hit Lucknow: 2 more days of intense heat; pre-monsoon s... - Bhaskar English
full_text:
Storm and rain hit Lucknow-Unnao, trees uprooted, 1 killed:2 more days of intense heat; pre-monsoon showers to bring weather relief thereafter
Severe heat continues to grip Uttar Pradesh. Late on Monday night, rain accompanied by strong winds occurred in Lucknow, Unnao, and nearby areas.
Several trees were uprooted in parts of Unnao, and an elderly man died after being trapped under a fallen tree. Power supply was also disrupted in several villages.
However, bright sunshine returned across most districts, including the state capital, from Tuesday morning. Conditions remain particularly severe in Bundelkhand and the districts of southern Uttar Pradesh, where intense sunlight and heatwave-like conditions have made life difficult for residents.
Meanwhile, the India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a heatwave alert for 16 districts of the state for Tuesday. Strong hot winds during the day and temperatures ranging between 42°C and 44°C, or even higher, have been forecast for several districts in Bundelkhand and Purvanchal.
At the same time, a new western disturbance is expected to become active from June 11, creating favourable conditions for pre-monsoon activity. Between June 11 and June 13, various parts of the state are likely to receive light rain or drizzle accompanied by strong winds.
According to the IMD, the monsoon, which is currently running three days behind schedule nationally, has now gained momentum. It is expected to reach Uttar Pradesh around its normal arrival date of June 20 and cover the entire state within the following 10 days.
Lucknow's senior scientist, Atul Kumar Singh, informed-
The ongoing fluctuations in weather in UP will continue for the next few days. On 9th and 10th June, there is a possibility of temperature increase in most districts. This will intensify the effect of heat. From June 11, pre-monsoon rains will occur due to the activation of western disturbance. Then, the weather will start becoming somewhat cooler. The mercury will roll down below 40C.
How will the weather be for the next 5 days? Know-
- 10 June: Weather will remain clear in Western UP. There are chances of light rain in Eastern UP. Heat waves will also blow.
- 11 June: Pre-monsoon activities may begin across the state. There are chances of rain in Eastern UP. Heat waves will blow in Western UP.
- 12 June: Rain with thunder and lightning may occur across the state. Relief from heat and heat waves is expected.
- 13 June: There are chances of drizzle in Eastern and Western UP. Temperature may drop by 3-4 °C.
- 14 June: Rain with thunder and lightning may occur across the state. Light cool winds will provide relief from the heat.
